title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 115.302 - Mail-in ballots, use of not authorized
text:
115.302.  Mail-in ballots, use of not authorized. — Mail-in ballots shall not be authorized by any executive or administrative order and no authorization for the use of mail-in ballots shall be inferred from any general law.  This section shall not preclude the use of absentee ballots authorized under this chapter.  Any expansion of the use of mail-in ballots subsequent to August 28, 2022, shall require the repeal of this section by explicit reference thereto.
(L. 2020 S.B. 631, A.L. 2022 H.B. 1878)
